name: Mount Unzen
eruptionHistory: The 1991-1995 eruption produced a lava dome and devastating pyroclastic flows that killed 43 people including volcanologists. The 1792 eruption triggered a tsunami killing ~15,000.
description: Mount Unzen is a group of stratovolcanoes on the Shimabara Peninsula. The 1792 sector collapse and resulting tsunami was the worst volcanic disaster in Japan's history.
